title: Working on aerial platforms
caption: Hands-on work with aerial robotic platforms used to connect predictive control algorithms with real experimental constraints.

title: Drone flight experiments
caption: Flight experiments provide a concrete testbed for studying safety, robustness, and performance in autonomous systems.

title: Tethered drone experiments
caption: Tethered aerial platforms provide a controlled setting for testing safety-critical control methods and learning-based adaptation.

title: Small-scale autonomous vehicles
caption: Small-scale vehicle platforms and student projects are useful testbeds for MPC, distributed coordination, and learning-based control.
